name: C2 Detection Standard
description: All C2 beaconing detection rules must threshold on 5+ connections to the same external IP within 60 seconds before generating an alert.

name: Incident Severity Classification
description: Incidents are classified as Critical (CVSS 9-10, active C2, data exfiltration), High (CVSS 7-8.9, SQLi with data access), Medium (CVSS 4-6.9, scanning), or Low (CVSS 0-3.9, policy violations).

name: Asset Risk Classification Standard
description: Network assets are classified as Critical (public-facing, contains PII), High (internal servers, AD), Medium (workstations), or Low (IoT, test devices). Classification drives monitoring and patching SLAs.
